description: Minimum unobscured target size among interactables in CSS pixels (min of width/height).
measurement: Compute bounding boxes of interactable elements; take min(side).
knobs: library size variants; CSS scale; custom padding; icon-only buttons

description: Minimum spacing / nearest-neighbor distance between targets (or non-overlap of 24px diameter circles).
measurement: Compute center distances or edge-to-edge distances between interactables; take minimum.
knobs: increase swatch count; reduce padding; compact variants

description: Fitts index of difficulty log2(D/W+1) for pointing tasks.
measurement: Define D from a standard start point (e.g., component center or last pointer); W = target width; compute ID.
knobs: move target farther; shrink width; reposition component

description: Interactables per area inside component bounding box.
measurement: Count interactables in component subtree; divide by area of component bbox.
knobs: increase options; reduce component size; multi-instance layouts

description: Number of selectable options (n).
measurement: Count list items, swatches, days, menu items, etc. (DOM-based).
knobs: add presets/options; larger calendars; deeper trees

description: Similarity among options (e.g., color distance between swatches, label edit distance).
measurement: Color: min ΔRGB/ΔE between target and nearest distractor; Text: edit distance or embedding similarity.
knobs: nearby shades; similar labels; same icons

description: Discrete vs continuous vs hybrid state space.
measurement: Metadata tag; derived from component type/props (step, freeform).
knobs: step size; freeSolo; snap; drag-only vs text input

description: Dimensionality of state (DoF).
measurement: Metadata tag per canonical type (e.g., slider=1, range=2, RGBA=4).
knobs: enable alpha; add second handle; add time to date

description: Smallest increment / step size / quantization.
measurement: Read from props (step) or infer from allowed values.
knobs: step=1 vs 0.1; minute step; slider marks

description: Normalized acceptance tolerance in state space.
measurement: Compute tol/range (scalar); ΔRGB/441.7 (color); days/month range etc.
knobs: tighten tolerance; require exact match

description: Number of UI layers required (inline=0, popover=1, nested panels>=2).
measurement: Metadata tag; can be computed from required open operations and DOM layering.
knobs: use inline vs popover; add nested panels (year/month)

description: Minimum number of atomic actions to complete task (open, navigate, select, confirm).
measurement: Derive from scripted oracle policy or annotated per template+variant.
knobs: require switching panels; multi-step flows; confirm button

description: Whether scrolling/virtualization is required to access target.
measurement: Check if target off-screen at load; measure required scroll distance (px).
knobs: long lists; virtual lists; small viewport

description: Delay between action and observable state change.
measurement: Instrument timestamps around onChange/onChangeComplete and DOM updates.
knobs: debounce; transitions; async validation

description: How long feedback remains visible (toast vs inline).
measurement: Measure duration until DOM element disappears; or categorical tag.
knobs: toast duration; inline hints; animations

description: Cost to recover from mistakes (presence and efficiency of reset/undo).
measurement: Oracle steps to return to neutral state; include clear buttons.
knobs: allowClear; undo; confirm dialogs

description: Whether current state is explicitly visible (text/preview).
measurement: Detect presence of value text, preview swatch, numeric label.
knobs: showText; hide labels; minimal UI

description: Accessibility semantics richness (roles, names, values in AX tree).
measurement: Count labeled nodes and value-bearing roles in subtree from accessibility snapshot.
knobs: aria-label/role completeness; labelledby; valueNow

description: Theme category (light/dark/high-contrast).
measurement: Metadata tag.
knobs: library theme switch; CSS variables

description: Contrast ratio of key text/icons vs background.
measurement: Sample computed colors and compute WCAG contrast ratio; report min.
knobs: dark mode; low contrast variants; tinted backgrounds

description: Normalized placement of component in viewport and distance-to-edge.
measurement: (cx/vw, cy/vh) and min distance to viewport edges.
knobs: place in corners/edges/center; responsive layouts

description: Rendered size of component bbox relative to baseline.
measurement: bbox area or width/height; normalize by baseline.
knobs: library size props; container width; CSS scale

description: Number of other interactables visible (scene complexity).
measurement: Count interactables outside component subtree in viewport.
knobs: add sidebar, table, filters; dashboard scenes

description: Number of same-type instances requiring disambiguation.
measurement: Count instances of canonical type on page.
knobs: duplicate components; similar labels; repeated sections
